heading: Bureau of Prisons policy on chapel library materials
label: 60534 Bureau of Prisons policy on chapel library materials
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to , The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 17534 of Title 42

children.text: any materials in a chapel library that seek to incite, promote, or otherwise suggest the commission of violence or criminal activity; and
any other materials prohibited by any other law or regulation.

children.heading: Rule of construction
children.label: b Rule of construction
children.text: Nothing in this section shall be construed to impact policies of the Bureau of Prisons related to access by specific prisoners to materials for security, safety, sanitation, or disciplinary reasons.
